review_execution.reviewed_input: Claude reviewed the current RP00.P02.M02.S06 git diff in the working tree with read-only Read/Grep and constrained git diff/status Bash tools. No write tools were granted.

findings.title: audit_event_ref enforcement is inherited/structural rather than asserted in the S06 function body
findings.description: Claude noted that audit_event_ref was enforced by the S05 input validator and S06 result validator, while S06 set audit_event_ref_satisfied true unconditionally.
findings.recommendation: Add an explicit S06-level audit_event_ref guard or derive audit_event_ref_satisfied from actual presence.
findings.disposition: Fixed after the single completed Claude review. precheckControlPlaneAIImplementationHandoffAuditHint now explicitly rejects missing or blank audit_event_ref before S05 result validation.

findings.title: Unreachable defensive re-check of permission decision after the S05 validator already guarantees it
findings.description: Claude noted that the permission_decision and permission_precheck_passed check is unreachable after assertControlPlaneAIImplementationHandoffPermissionPrecheckResult.
findings.recommendation: May keep for explicitness or remove as dead code.
findings.disposition: Deferred intentionally. The branch is harmless defense-in-depth and documents the S06 dependency on an S05 allow_metadata_only permission pass. It is not a product behavior risk.

findings.title: Forbidden-claim truthiness check diverges from the S05 unknown/forbidden-claim pattern
findings.description: Claude noted that forbidden claims used truthiness while unknown claims used the S05 undefined/null/false-only no-op rule.
findings.recommendation: Apply the same undefined/null/false test to forbidden and unknown claim branches.
findings.disposition: Fixed after the single completed Claude review. Forbidden audit claims now reject any value except undefined, null, or false, and service/RP00 validator coverage includes append_audit_ledger:0.

findings.title: required_audit_hint_fields is a hardcoded subset of the RP00.P00.M05.S01 baseline and is not cross-validated against the baseline definition
findings.description: Claude noted that S06 validates a five-field metadata-only audit hint subset and the baseline ref, but the baseline does not expose a structured machine-readable audit evidence field list to derive from.
findings.recommendation: If the baseline later exposes structured audit evidence fields, derive or cross-validate against it.
findings.disposition: Deferred as an explicit boundary. S06 is a synthetic metadata-only audit hint receipt and does not write audit events or append audit ledgers. Future structured baseline field derivation belongs to a later audit evidence slice.

parsed_review.summary: Claude returned PASS_WITH_FINDINGS from one completed read-only review. It found no P0/P1/P2 and did not block subphase or goal closeout. S06-P3-01 and S06-P3-03 were fixed. S06-P3-02 is retained as harmless defense-in-depth. S06-P3-04 is explicitly deferred because structured baseline-derived audit evidence fields are outside this metadata-only no-write precheck.
parsed_review.residual_risk: Low for S06 because it remains synthetic, no-write, no-runtime, no-service-execution, no runtime permission engine, no AuthZ evaluator call, no audit ledger append, no audit event write, no implementation handoff drafting, and requires an S05 Permission precheck pass plus audit_event_ref before recording a metadata-only audit hint.
